message: Replaced repeated helper-call taint rescans with reverse-adjacency queue propagation; added deep helper-chain analyzer regression and helper-graph analyzer benchmark.

Verified helper taint propagation now builds reverse adjacency from callee to callers and uses queue propagation seeded by initially forbidden helpers, avoiding repeated full helper-call rescans while preserving kernel-call diagnostics. Regression coverage includes a deep helper chain diagnostic test, and benchmark coverage exists at benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks/PluginAnalyzer/PluginAnalyzerHelperGraphBenchmarks.cs with MemoryDiagnoser and 100/1,000/10,000 helper counts. Validation passed: PluginAnalyzer-focused tests passed 110/110; benchmark project build succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors; CodeEnforcer passed; agentq doctor reported doctor ok.
